zh.lifeSummary: 當Auffroy Alfred de Fougères於0980年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯時，他的父親Meen de Rennes, Seigneur de Fougères16歲，母親Baroness Dame Alpais de Mayenne, Countess of Rennes36歲。他於大約1038年與Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1048年在他的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Auffroy Alfred de Fougères于0980年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯时，他的父亲Meen de Rennes, Seigneur de Fougères16岁，母亲Baroness Dame Alpais de Mayenne, Countess of Rennes36岁。他于大约1038年与Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1048年在他的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fougères
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Armand, Emile, Fleurette, Thierry.

French (Fougère): topographic name for someone who lived in a place densely grown with ferns, from Old French foug(i)ere ‘fern, bracken’ (from Late Latin filicaria); or a habitational name from (La) Fougère, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Fugere .

History: Jean Fougère from Poupry in Eure-et-Loir, France, married first Marie Bourg in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada) in 1713, and second Marie-Madeleine Belliveau in Port-Toulouse (St. Peters), NS, Canada, c. 1728.

variants.name: Fugere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Celine, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Normand, Philippe, Pierre, Sylvian.
French (Fugère): variant of Fougère (see Fougere ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Alfred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English name derived from ælf ‘elf, supernatural being’ + ræd ‘counsel’. It was a relatively common name before the Norman Conquest of Britain, being borne most notably by Alfred the Great ( 849–899 ), King of Wessex. After the Conquest it was adopted by the Normans in a variety of more or less radically altered forms ( see Avery ). In some regions the forms Alvery and Avery never fell entirely out of favour and became locally popular in the 16th century. It provides a rare example ( Edward is another) of a distinctively Old English name that has spread widely on the Continent. It was strongly revived in the 19th century, along with other names of pre-Conquest historical figures, faded in the mid-20th century, but has since recovered some popularity.

en.lifeSummary: When Auffroy Alfred de Fougères was born in 0980, in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Meen de Rennes, Seigneur de Fougères, was 16 and his mother, Baroness Dame Alpais de Mayenne, Countess of Rennes, was 36. He married Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy about 1038, in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1048, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Auffroy Alfred de Fougères est né en 0980, à Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Meen de Rennes, Seigneur de Fougères, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Baroness Dame Alpais de Mayenne, Countess of Rennes, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy environ 1038, à Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1048, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Auffroy Alfred de Fougères 0980 in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Meen de Rennes, Seigneur de Fougères 16 und seine Mutter Baroness Dame Alpais de Mayenne, Countess of Rennes 36. Er hat um 1038 in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1048 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy circa 1038, nel Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1048, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ko.Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니
ko.lifeSummary: Auffroy Alfred de Fougères(이)가 0980년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Meen de Rennes, Seigneur de Fougères(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Dame Alpais de Mayenne, Countess of Rennes(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1038년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니에서 Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1048년 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy aproximadamente 1038, em Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Auffroy Alfred de Fougères родился в 0980 г. в местности фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Meen de Rennes, Seigneur de Fougères было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Dame Alpais de Mayenne, Countess of Rennes, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy около 1038 г. в местности меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1048 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

Se casó con Aenor De Saumur De Pontlevoy aproximadamente 1038, en Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas.
